---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Chronos
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## How It Fits the "Time is Currency" Theme

Describe how this feature aligns with Chronos's core concept of treating time as currency.

## User Story

> As a **[type of user]**, I want **[goal]** so that **[benefit]**.

## Mockups / Wireframes

If applicable, add sketches, mockups, or wireframes to illustrate your idea.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
